construct_verdict_reason: Most items measure attitudes toward foreigners, but p44 is a behavioral/demographic item measuring actual contact rather than evaluative orientation.

items.reason: Directly measures general evaluative opinion toward foreigners in Mexico.
Measures perceived economic contribution, an explicit component of the construct domain.
Measures actual behavioral contact/cohabitation with foreigners rather than evaluative attitudes or opinions about them.
Measures views on appropriate number of foreigners, an explicit component of the construct domain.
Measures perceived respect for foreigners' rights, relevant to attitudes about their treatment and entitlements.
Measures beliefs about rights entitlements for foreigners, an explicit component of the construct domain.
Measures perceived discrimination against foreigners, an explicit component of the construct domain.
Measures perceived differential treatment based on origin, relevant to attitudes about discrimination and fairness toward foreigners.
